neck.duration_course_frequency_and_progr.wording: 계속되는지 간헐적인지, 한 번에 얼마나 지속되는지와 좋아짐·악화·반복 양상을 알려주세요.

neck.exact_site_laterality_and_extent.wording: 목 앞·뒤·옆, 목덜미 또는 어깨선 중 정확한 부위와 왼쪽·오른쪽·가운데, 퍼지는 범위를 알려주세요.

neck.family_neurologic_inflammatory_or_s.wording: 가족의 신경질환, 염증성 관절질환 또는 중요한 척추질환이 있으면 관계와 발병 나이를 알려주세요.

neck.new_bladder_bowel_or_saddle_change.wording: 목 증상과 함께 새 소변·대변 조절 문제 또는 회음부 감각 변화가 생겼나요?

neck.night_rest_pain_and_sleep_interrupt.wording: 가만히 있거나 밤에 더 아픈지, 통증으로 잠에서 깨는 횟수와 자세 영향을 알려주세요.

neck.occupation_ergonomics_screen_and_dr.wording: 직업·학업, 화면·휴대전화 사용, 운전, 고정 자세·진동·머리 위 작업 시간과 증상 변화를 알려주세요.

neck.onset_date_time_and_speed.wording: 목 증상이 처음 시작된 날짜·시각과 갑자기 또는 서서히 시작했는지 알려주세요.

neck.patient_concern_goal_and_other_deta.wording: 질문에 없지만 의료진에게 꼭 전달할 내용, 가장 걱정하는 원인과 이번 진료에서 원하는 도움을 알려주세요.

neck.pregnancy_postpartum_severe_headach.wording: 임신 중이거나 출산 후 6주 이내이며 심한 두통·시야 변화·경련·한쪽 증상 또는 매우 높은 혈압과 새 목 통증이 함께 있나요?

neck.range_of_motion_and_torticollis.wording: 목을 좌우·앞뒤로 움직일 수 있는 범위와 한쪽으로 기울거나 돌아간 상태, 움직임 제한을 알려주세요.

guideline_behavior.rationale: Interview behavior derived from guidelines may change with recommendations.

local_jurisdiction.rationale: Local pathways and administrative rules may change quickly.

safety_critical.rationale: Safety behavior and escalation knowledge require frequent monitoring.

stable_semantic.rationale: Atomic patient-reportable concepts are relatively stable but still require periodic review.

terminology_mapping.rationale: Terminology and interoperability baselines have independent releases.

clinical_guideline.rationale: Daily automated monitoring provides early detection for high-impact guideline changes; full review occurs only when change is detected or the review date is reached.

interoperability_standard.rationale: Versioned interoperability standards and domain datasets are monitored weekly; detected changes trigger mapping and Coverage review without changing clinical rules.

nice_guidance.rationale: NICE guidance is versioned and may be amended; weekly monitoring detects changes without implying weekly clinical re-review.

public_health_guidance.rationale: Public-health pages can change between formal releases; weekly monitoring is appropriate for the research package.

terminology_server.rationale: Terminology servers publish versioned content; monthly baseline monitoring balances stability and acquisition cost.

assertions: Cervical radiculopathy referral assessment includes gait disturbance, clumsy or weak hands or legs, brisk reflexes, extensor plantar responses and new bladder or bowel disturbance.
Persistent disabling or uncontrolled pain and age under 20 modify referral decisions; rapidly progressive weakness and swallowing or breathing compromise require urgent assessment.
artifacts.title: Suspected neurological conditions: recognition and referral

assertions: Imaging pathways distinguish acute or increasing pain, radiculopathy, trauma, infection, malignancy and prior cervical surgery contexts.
The source supports collecting red flags and prior procedure context but is not used by runtime to order or diagnose.
artifacts.title: ACR Appropriateness Criteria: Cervical Pain or Cervical Radiculopathy

assertions: Meningitis symptoms can include fever, headache, stiff neck, confusion, nausea or vomiting and photophobia.
Meningococcal disease can worsen rapidly and requires immediate medical attention.
artifacts.title: Meningococcal Disease Symptoms and Complications

assertions: Build-time lookup confirmed active Neck pain (finding) 81680005, Cervical radiculopathy (disorder) 54404000 and Neck stiffness (finding) 161882006 with Korean descriptions.
MRCM lookup for Neck pain returned Severity 246112005 and Finding site 363698007 among allowed attributes; terminology does not determine urgency or diagnosis.
artifacts.title: STOM neck-pain terminology and MRCM lookup

expected_known_facts.neck.patient_concern_goal_and_other_deta: 목 증상 외에 예약 시간 변경 요청도 전달하고 싶음
